patch file

Hello,

Thanks for the hint!

poudriere test builds ok on all available releases: 140, 130, 123 (amd64/i386)

On my pc I have to add an variable so that program works:

ASSUME_NO_MOVING_GC_UNSAFE_RISK_IT_WITH=go1.18

Thanks,

Nuno Teixeira
